单女主！卡尔蜜拉！单女主！
本书原名:人在奥特，希望与奇迹之光
本书又名:人在奥特，幸福生活从跟卡尔蜜拉在一起开始（意思就是，拆了卡尔蜜拉与特利迦的CP，不喜勿喷）
林羽莫名其妙来到了特利迦世界，还吸收了永恒核心绑定了创造系统。
什么？双位一体的w奥特曼？智慧之光的拉结尔？都是林羽创造出来的？
从此，林羽走上了一条给世界带来希望和奇迹的道路。
不管什么时候都不要放弃，燃烧心中的信念之火，希望与奇迹就会降临。被绝望浸透的土地，迟早会长出名为希望的花来。
在黑暗降临，绝望之中，林羽成为了希望与奇迹……
诺亚：如果他稍微正经一点是一个不错的前辈。
奥特之王:我曾一度怀疑谁才是反派。
雷杰多：没事不要老是召唤我啊！
赛迦:看不见我，看不见我……
就这样林羽在奥特世界开始了他快乐的旅程。
目前特利迦世界（短），梦比优斯世界（长），特利迦舞台剧（短），雷欧（中），奈克瑟斯（中），欧布原生之初，戴拿，超八，银河帝国","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/aa8b3c0000000412a615eb7b3e7391d8","author":"清晨不见大雾","author_id":"","book_id":"7145661179552074782","book_name":"人在奥特，准备整活","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5654人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7145661264092463630","read_count":"5654","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1971092"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"891","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,奥特同人,无敌,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/062e24231d63655ac02c1413e1f2538e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779316759&x-signature=0SkPMnckQlVfLAew3jfAlmLyeYM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4256909545456237","extra":{"comment_jump -static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7145661179552074782","book_info":{"abstract":"【奥特同人+无敌+脑洞大开+无厘头＋填补遗憾】
